hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'deploy.sh'; then last_test=$(find quality/tests -name '*.py' -newer custom_components/universal_room_automation/const.py 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -z "$last_test" ]; then echo 'WARNING: Tests may not have been run since last code change' >&2; fi; fi; exit 0
